caption:
Ramadan Kareem! Looking for a venue to visit this Ramadan? Expo City Dubai is a vibrant destination this Holy Month.

Here are the things to watch out for:
✨ Ramadan shows, workshops and games
⭐️ Food and retail market
✨ Communal Iftar

🗓️ From 3 March to 22 April, 2023
🎟️ Free entry, selected workshops and activities  are chargeable.
